name: agent-plugins-marketplace
description: VinhLTT's personal agent plugin marketplace. A curated collection that combines plugins I develop myself with carefully selected plugins aggregated from across the community. Covers a wide range of use cases - web search, data analysis, developer tooling, and more - so you can browse, install, and mix first-party and third-party plugins from a single source to extend your agent's capabilities.

plugins.name: code-simplifier
plugins.description: Agent that simplifies and refines code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving functionality. Focuses on recently modified code.

plugins.name: claude-code-setup
plugins.description: Analyze codebases and recommend tailored Claude Code automations such as hooks, skills, MCP servers, and subagents.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create new skills, improve existing skills, and measure skill performance.

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive toolkit for developing Claude Code plugins. Includes expert skills covering hooks, MCP integration, commands, agents, and best practices.

plugins.name: hookify
plugins.description: Easily create custom hooks to prevent unwanted behaviors by analyzing conversation patterns or from explicit instructions.

plugins.name: pyright-lsp
plugins.description: Python language server (Pyright) for type checking and code intelligence.

plugins.name: typescript-lsp
plugins.description: TypeScript/JavaScript language server for enhanced code intelligence.

plugins.name: pr-review-toolkit
plugins.description: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification.

plugins.name: claude-md-management
plugins.description: Tools to maintain and improve CLAUDE.md files - audit quality, capture session learnings, and keep project memory current.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Automated code review for pull requests using multiple specialized agents with confidence-based scoring to filter false positives.

plugins.name: commit-commands
plugins.description: Commands for git commit workflows including commit, push, and PR creation.

plugins.name: security-guidance
plugins.description: Security reminder hook that warns about potential security issues when editing files, including command injection, XSS, and unsafe code patterns.

plugins.name: session-report
plugins.description: Generate an explorable HTML report of Claude Code session usage - tokens, cache efficiency, subagents, skills, and the most expensive prompts.

plugins.name: context7-plugin
plugins.description: Upstash Context7 MCP server for up-to-date documentation lookup. Pull version-specific documentation and code examples directly from source repositories into your LLM context.

plugins.name: context7-cli
plugins.description: Context7 CLI tooling - bundles ctx7 CLI skill and find-docs skill from upstash/context7. Use for library documentation lookup and skill management via the ctx7 CLI without requiring the MCP server.

plugins.name: gh-community
plugins.description: Custom topic-organized refactor of gh-cli skill from github/awesome-copilot. Slim SKILL.md + references/ split by GitHub feature area. Use for gh CLI workflows: repos, PRs, issues, releases, Actions, secrets, gists.

plugins.name: cc-toolkit
plugins.description: Claude Code utility toolkit. Currently bundles cc-ask - route Claude Code / Agent SDK / Anthropic API questions to the built-in claude-code-guide agent.

plugins.name: chrome-devtools-mcp
plugins.description: Control and inspect a live Chrome browser from your coding agent. Record performance traces, analyze network requests, check console messages, and automate browser actions with Puppeteer.

plugins.name: document-skills
plugins.description: Document processing suite for Excel (xlsx), Word (docx), PowerPoint (pptx), and PDF - official Anthropic skills.

plugins.name: langfuse
plugins.description: Interact with Langfuse LLM observability platform - query traces, scores, sessions, and prompts via CLI; instrument applications; access Langfuse documentation. Official skill from Langfuse.

plugins.name: vercel-labs
plugins.description: Curated skills from Vercel Labs. Currently bundles `find-skills` - discover and install agent skills from the open agent-skills ecosystem; activates when users ask 'how do I do X', 'find a skill for X', or want to extend agent capabilities.

plugins.name: research-toolkit
plugins.description: Deep research toolkit. Bundles docs-seeker + research skills and researcher agent for systematic technical investigation across context7, GitHub MCP, WebFetch, WebSearch (optional Gemini CLI).

plugins.name: plugins-toolkit
plugins.description: Tooling for Claude Code plugin authors. Currently ships plugin-bump (per-plugin version + changelog + manifest).
